title: YEAUPE Shower Head and Hose with Filter - High Pressure Shower Head with 1.5M Hose Powerful Flow Showerheads for Low Pressure Hard Water Filter Shower Hose and Head Water Saving Shower Head 6 Modes
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: 【Valid Filter Shower Head and Hose】- YEAUPE is committed to the innovation of shower head products, adding 3 different mineral stones which will help to remove chlorine and flouride, toxins, heavy metals, rust and odor from the shower water,purify the water clean,a good water softener shower head

【High Pressure Shower Head】- This low pressure power shower head adpots air pressurization technology, which can increase the water pressure.It has the density and strong water to bring you full coverage of the rain experience.It is ideal for quickly and thoroughly rinsing out shampoo, shower gel, and conditioners

【6 Jet Spray Modes & One-Hand Switch】- This hard water filter shower head has 6 different Jet modes could meet all the different needs of your family.The One-Hand Operation Switch, easy to switch and durable than the ordinary shower head

【Anti-limescale Shower Head and Hose】- The shower head with the newest design of anti-limescale will prevent the build-up of limescale and easy to clean with cloth.It will give you a better waterfall shower experience

【Easy to Install】- This shower head comes with 1.5m hose,360°anti-twist ,easy to install without any tools.If you live in hard water areas and need to replace a shower head, YEAUPE hard water filter shower head is your better choice and provide you healthier shower water.
description: From the manufacturer Why can you choose and trust YEAUPE energy water saving shower head ? YEAUPE water saving shower head, help you save 40% water. According to The Sunday Times, the British Ministry of Environment, Food and Rural Affairs recently launched a water saving target, striving to reduce per capita daily water consumption from the current 145 to 110 liters,save 25% water every day . YEAUPE Low Flow Shower Head hits the spot. We make a real water saving. In any mode, the water consumption per minute will not exceed 9L . (Of course, if the pressure is too low, you can simply unscrew the flow limiter.) If the water in your house is very hard, we recommend changing the stones after about 3-4 months . Of course, it depends on many factors how long and how often you take a shower, and above all how hard the water is (lime content). The eco water softener shower head fits any hose. Installation is easy, no tools are required, and you can install it in minutes. YEAUPE shower heads are made from the significantly more complex PC/ABS plastic mixture. They are particularly stable, unbreakable and durable. The anti-scale silicon nozzles prevent the formation of scale. YEAUPE power filter shower head are therefore also very easy to descale. Just wipe off the scale with the towel or sponge. YEAUPE shower head hose with anti-twist protection is kink-proof and flexible: the shower hose is reinforced with 6 longitudinal threads and is particularly pressure-resistant and tensile. Polyester threads in the cross fabric provide optimal kink protection. So the shower hose is kink-proof and still flexible and rotatable. The smooth PVC surface without grooves is easy to clean and descale. Limescale and soap residue don't stand a chance. The water efficient shower head has a toggle switch with which you can switch between 6 jet types. I highly recommend trying the massage jet. It can bring you a very comfortable experience. If you are not completely satisfied with the purchase, write to us and we will solve the problem for you within 24 hours. Handheld Water Saving Shower Head with Mineral Filter Stones 3-layer filtration will soften and purify the shower water Triple filtration, give you a healthier bathing experience YEAUPE Water Saving Shower Head 6 Jet Types for Different Shower Enjoyment: The economy shower head meets your different needs as much as possible. To save even more water, we recommend the daily use of Power Massage+Pulse mode (9 L/min) (at 3 bar). We want to save water for you, but without any loss of comfort! YEAUPE shower head with water-saving technology requires up to 40% less water than conventional products. The jet type determines the flow rate. When the water pressure is 3 bar, the water flow of the shower head will be in 7.35L/min to 9L/min. Anti-limescale Silicone Nozzles 120mm Shower Head Face with Anti-calcium silicone, Anti-clogging and easy to clean with cloth.High quality material with Chrome ,you can consider cleaning with baking soda and white vinegar,it will look brand new. Super Fine Water Outlet: The pressure boosting shower head with 0.5mm fine hole water outlet, bid farewell to the problem of insufficient water pressure, and the water flow is more delicate and comfortable.
